title: CLI-Notify Protocol v2
description: Message bus protocol v2. 30 Claude Code Hooks mapped to EventTypes + 7 system types. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — all components generate their types from this schema.

type.description: Event type discriminator — snake_case Hook name or system type

msgType.description: Message bus classification: event (fire-and-forget), request (expects response), response (answers a request)

correlationId.description: Links request to response. Required for msgType=request/response, null for events.

groupId.description: Groups related messages within a turn or agent batch. Set by plugin on UserPromptSubmit, cleared on Stop.

from.description: Message origin: desktop, mobile, or server (relay)

encrypted.description: Whether the data field is E2EE encrypted. When true, data must be an EncryptedPayload.

data.description: Message payload. When encrypted=false, this is an EnvelopeData object. When encrypted=true, this is an EncryptedPayload.

_decision.description: Relay-layer metadata (underscore prefix = not part of application protocol). Used for mobile-to-relay approval responses. Never encrypted. Only set on messages flowing through the relay approval pathway.

MsgType.description: event: fire-and-forget notification; request: expects a matching response; response: answers a prior request

EnvelopeData.description: Unencrypted message payload. Contains the raw Hook JSON plus optional metadata fields for routing and display.

raw.description: Full Hook stdin JSON. Contains the original hook event data from Claude Code.

tool_use_id.description: Unique identifier for tool call. Populated by PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, PermissionRequest, PermissionDenied.

agent_id.description: Subagent identifier. Populated by SubagentStart, SubagentStop.

turn_id.description: Conversation turn identifier. Generated by plugin on UserPromptSubmit, cleared on Stop.

truncated.description: Whether data.raw was truncated due to size limits (max_data_size config).

EncryptedPayload.description: E2EE encrypted data field (AES-256-GCM via ECDH P-256 + HKDF-SHA256 with info string 'cli-notify-v2')

ephemeralKey.description: Base64-encoded ephemeral ECDH P-256 public key (uncompressed point, 65 bytes)

ciphertext.description: Base64-encoded AES-256-GCM ciphertext (includes 16-byte auth tag appended)
